title: Fishing Crates
description: Adds Crates to fish up just like in Terraria!
body:
# Fishing Crates
This Mod adds 3 Fishing Crates that you are able to Fish up. Obtain Loot by placing Crates and breaking them!

Also includes a custom Music Disc!

![Crate Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1e889b6f273e70b730429b585962c53432e47df.png)

Textures are made by [Kitawa](https://x.com/Kitawa_)

Feel free to report bugs or suggest new features on the mods github

The mod will most likely stay on Fabric since i like working on Fabric more and maintaining multiple loaders is kinda annoying

Now has a Config Screen to configure the weight for Crates
